description: LLM-droppable instruction toolkit for analyzing US medical bills, deduplicating follow-up statements, and running a months-long dispute process

features.title: Initial kit scaffold
features.description: LLM operating layer, methodology rules, federal-law references, schemas, letter templates, tracker template

features.title: Tennessee state pack
features.description: Worked TN state-law layer including § 68-11-220 itemization, § 56-7-105 bad faith, § 56-2-305 dental, General Sessions small claims

features.title: Georgia state pack
features.description: Worked GA state-law layer with O.C.G.A. § 10-1-393(b)(14) automatic itemization, § 10-1-399 FBPA private right of action, § 33-4-6 bad faith, § 33-20E ground ambulance

features.title: Hardship negotiation letter template
features.description: For correctly-billed but unaffordable charges; anchors to Medicare allowable rate, references IRS § 501(r)

features.title: FDCPA § 1692g validation request template
features.description: Third-party medical-debt collector validation within 30 days of first contact

features.title: Ground-ambulance rule and dispute template
features.description: Federal NSA explicitly excludes ground ambulance; state-by-state protection table + two-variant letter (state-protected vs unprotected)

features.title: IRS § 501(r) Financial Assistance Policy application template
features.description: For non-profit hospital bills; triggers § 1.501(r)-6 collection-action suspension during pendency

features.title: CMS Hospital Price Transparency complaint template
features.description: For hospitals not posting compliant machine-readable file under 45 CFR Part 180

features.title: PPDR (Patient-Provider Dispute Resolution) walkthrough rule
features.description: Federal NSA self-pay arbitration process at nsa-idr.cms.gov; $25 filing fee, 120-day window, collection-pause during pendency

features.title: California state pack
features.description: Worked CA state-law layer with AB 72 surprise billing, IMR, Hospital Fair Pricing Act, AB 716 ground ambulance, SB 1061 credit-reporting

features.title: Texas state pack
features.description: Worked TX state-law layer with Chapter 541 private right of action, SB 1264 balance billing, SB 916 ground ambulance, TX Constitution wage-garnishment ban

features.title: New York state pack
features.description: Worked NY state-law layer with Fair Medical Debt Reporting Act, Consumer Credit Fairness Act, PHL § 2807-k(9-a) hospital FA at 400% FPL

features.title: Florida state pack
features.description: Worked FL state-law layer with § 624.155 Civil Remedy Notice, § 395.301 7-day itemization, HB 7089 3-year SOL on facility medical debt

features.title: Medicare five-level appeals track
features.description: Redetermination, QIC reconsideration, ALJ at OMHA, Appeals Council, federal court — for Parts A, B, C, D

features.title: Medicaid appeal template
features.description: Two-step process (MCO internal then state fair hearing) under 42 CFR § 438.402 with Aid Paid Pending and EPSDT block; TennCare worked example

features.title: Dental dispute template
features.description: Downcoding, bundling, frequency-limit denials, VCC objections; Tennessee § 56-2-305 worked example

features.title: Glossary
features.description: Plain-English definitions for every acronym used in the kit

features.title: FAQ
features.description: 20+ patient-facing questions covering kit use, deadlines, escalation, edge cases, contribution

features.title: LLM compatibility notes
features.description: Coverage of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Llama, Qwen with context-window and vision guidance

features.title: Short-context QUICKSTART
features.description: 7-stage staged-load pattern for LLMs under 32k tokens

features.title: Contribution guidelines
features.description: PR guidelines with 12-section state-pack checklist, template-creation rules, schema-extension rules

features.title: Tracker CSV validator script
features.description: Python 3.11+ stdlib-only validator with structural checks against the TOML schemas

features.title: Pennsylvania state pack
features.description: Worked PA state-law layer with 42 Pa.C.S. § 8371 bad faith (interest+punitives+fees+costs), § 8127 wage-garnishment exemption, UTPCPL/FCEUA original-creditor reach, Act 146 surprise billing

features.title: Illinois state pack
features.description: Worked IL state-law layer with Hospital Uninsured Patient Discount Act (135% of cost cap), ICFA original-creditor reach with treble damages, 10-year SOL, Fair Patient Billing Act, SB 2405 ground ambulance

features.title: Ohio state pack
features.description: Worked OH state-law layer with OCSPA reach over hospitals post-Brakle, Hospital Care Assurance Program statutory free-care at 100% FPL, § 3902.50 ground ambulance, no general hospital-lien statute

features.title: Multi-encounter worked example
features.description: Two hospital encounters, 7 bills, three sessions over six weeks demonstrating dedup, encounter linking, save/resume, settlement accounting

features.title: Insurance-denial worked example
features.description: ERISA self-funded plan denial, internal appeal, external IRO review, parallel EBSA and state DOI complaints

features.title: GitHub repo polish
features.description: Issue templates (bug, state-pack request, content correction), PR template, SECURITY policy, CODE_OF_CONDUCT (Contributor Covenant 2.1)

features.title: CI workflow and validator tests
features.description: GitHub Actions workflow runs validator and pytest; markdown link checker. 8 pytest cases covering happy path and error cases

features.title: EMTALA rule and complaint template
features.description: Federal emergency-care anti-dumping statute; CMS regulatory complaint route; civil action under § 1395dd(d)(2)(A)

features.title: HIPAA right-of-access rule and OCR complaint template
features.description: 45 CFR § 164.524; 30-day deadline, reasonable cost-based fee cap, OCR complaint within 180 days

features.title: Auto med-pay and accident-related billing rule
features.description: Med-pay / PIP / UM-UIM / hospital lien interactions for motor-vehicle accident billing

features.title: Auto med-pay letter template (3 variants)
features.description: Demand to apply med-pay/PIP; demand to bill health insurance instead of relying on lien; challenge to perfected hospital lien

features.title: Workers' compensation rule
features.description: Balance-billing prohibition for accepted WC claims; state-specific statutes; coordination with health insurance for contested claims

features.title: North Carolina state pack
features.description: Worked NC state-law layer including § 75-1.1 UDPA with treble damages

features.title: Michigan state pack
features.description: Worked MI state-law layer including the no-fault auto-insurance interaction with medical billing

features.title: Washington state pack
features.description: Worked WA state-law layer with Charity Care Act (100% free care to 300% FPL), IFCA bad faith, Balance Billing Protection Act including ground ambulance

features.title: New Jersey state pack
features.description: Worked NJ state-law layer with Consumer Fraud Act (mandatory treble + fees), comprehensive state-funded charity care program, Out-of-Network Consumer Protection Act predating NSA, Louisa Carman Medical Debt Relief Act

features.title: Virginia state pack
features.description: Worked VA state-law layer with VCPA treble damages, small-claims no-attorney rule, Balance Billing Protection Act with HB 730 ground ambulance, Va. Code § 59.1-444.4 medical-debt credit-reporting prohibition (2025), Medical Debt Protection Act 2026

features.title: Arizona state pack
features.description: Worked AZ state-law layer with Proposition 209 (3% medical-debt interest cap + garnishment + homestead protections), Noble/Rawlings/Linthicum bad-faith trilogy, small-claims no-attorney rule, Abbott v. Banner hospital-lien customary-charges rule

features.title: Massachusetts state pack
features.description: Worked MA state-law layer with Chapter 93A mandatory 30-day demand-letter mechanic + mandatory treble damages + mandatory attorney's fees, Health Safety Net Program, Chapter 58 near-universal coverage context

features.title: Bankruptcy and medical debt rule
features.description: Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13 decision-making, automatic stay under 11 U.S.C. § 362, coordination with other dispute tracks, Upsolve referral for simple cases

features.title: Small claims walkthrough
features.description: Full worked Tennessee General Sessions filing for $310 walking-boot price-gouging dispute: filing decision, statement of claim, exhibits, hearing-day script, post-judgment collection

features.title: Deadline-watcher script
features.description: scripts/deadline_watch.py reports overdue and upcoming bill actions from a tracker CSV with configurable window

features.title: START_HERE copy-paste quickstart
features.description: docs/START_HERE.md three-minute setup with copy-paste prompts for the 7 most common patient scenarios

features.title: State packs for the remaining 34 states
features.description: AK, AL, AR, CO, CT, DE (initial), HI, IA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MD, ME, MN, MO, MS, MT, ND, NE, NH, NM, NV, OK, OR, RI, SC, SD, UT, VT, WI, WV, WY

features.title: Spanish-language patient-facing prompts and templates
features.description: Translate the most-used templates and rules into Spanish for bilingual patients

features.title: Anonymized real-outcomes bank
features.description: Community-contributed anonymized dispute outcomes for calibration

features.title: Advocate-side variant
features.description: Kit oriented for patient advocates handling multiple patients simultaneously

features.title: Turquoise Health API integration
features.description: Auto-lookup of fair prices given CPT and ZIP code via Turquoise's API
